description: Configure the 'build-agent' service in /home/ga/build-agent/ to securely access the host's Docker socket. The container currently fails to access the socket because it runs as a non-root user. The container must continue to run as the 'agent' user (UID 1000) and you must not change the permissions of /var/run/docker.sock on the host. Ensure the 'agent' user within the container can successfully execute docker commands.
